title: Village Diplomacy
description: Complete reputation system for villages with unique NPC personalities, dynamic relationships, and iron golem behavior.
body:
# Village Diplomacy

Transform your Minecraft village interactions with a complete reputation and relationship system!

## Features

### Dynamic Reputation System
- 7 reputation ranks from HERO to VILLAIN
- Actions affect your standing: trading helps, harming hurts
- Epic rank change notifications with particle effects

### Unique NPC Personalities
- Each villager has a unique name and personality
- Behavioral traits: Friendly, Greedy, Gossip, Outgoing, and more
- 250+ contextual messages based on your reputation
- Special interactions when placing blocks near villages

### Iron Golem System
- Golems remember your actions and can become hostile
- Unique golem personalities with temperament and loyalty
- Named golems with creation stories

### Village Relations
- Villages are named and tracked
- Monitor your reputation in each settlement
- View relationships with command

## Command

- `/diplomacy info` - Check your reputation and village relations

## Requirements

- Minecraft 1.20.1
- Forge 47.4.10+

## Available Languages

- English
- Spanish (Español)

---

Build your reputation through trade and good deeds, or become a feared villain!
